bio.Recent_Position: Software Engineer Intern at MeFit IOT in Santa Clara
bio.Bios: Hey guys! My name is Gaurav Mohan and I initiated in the fall quarter of my freshman year here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy going on sunset hikes and watching a psychological thriller with my friends. A fun fact about myself is that I play different sports with different dominant hands. Ask me about all the spring break plans I had to cancel when corona hit at recruitment!
